description: Phase 1 source-level Simplified Chinese translations for hard-coded Codex CLI/TUI prompts outside slash-command descriptions.

replacements.from: Would you like to run the following command?
Do you want to approve network access to \"{}\"?
replacements.to: 是否批准访问网络主机 “{}”？

replacements.from: Would you like to grant these permissions?
Would you like to make the following edits?
Yes, and don't ask again for commands that start with `{rendered_prefix}`
replacements.to: 是，并且本会话中不再询问以 `{rendered_prefix}` 开头的命令

replacements.from: Yes, and allow this host for this conversation
replacements.to: 是，本次对话允许此主机

replacements.from: Yes, and allow these permissions for this session
replacements.to: 是，本会话允许这些权限

replacements.from: Yes, and don't ask again for this command in this session
replacements.to: 是，本会话不再询问此命令

replacements.from: Yes, and allow this host in the future
No, and block this host in the future
No, and tell Codex what to do differently
replacements.to: 否，并告诉 Codex 如何调整

replacements.from: Yes, and don't ask again for these files
replacements.to: 是，本会话不再询问这些文件

replacements.from: Yes, grant these permissions for this turn
replacements.to: 是，为本轮授予这些权限

replacements.from: Yes, grant for this turn with strict auto review
replacements.to: 是，本轮授予并启用严格自动审查

replacements.from: Yes, grant these permissions for this session
replacements.to: 是，为本会话授予这些权限

replacements.from: Run the tool and remember this choice for this session.
replacements.to: 运行工具，并在本会话记住此选择。

replacements.from: Allow this request and remember this choice for this session.
replacements.to: 允许此请求，并在本会话记住此选择。

replacements.from: Run the tool and remember this choice for future tool calls.
replacements.to: 运行工具，并为以后的工具调用记住此选择。

replacements.from: Allow this request and remember this choice for future requests.
replacements.to: 允许此请求，并为以后的请求记住此选择。

replacements.from: Sign in with ChatGPT to use Codex as part of your paid plan
replacements.to: 使用 ChatGPT 登录，通过你的付费计划使用 Codex

replacements.from: or connect an API key for usage-based billing
replacements.to: 或连接 API key，按用量计费

replacements.from: Usage included with Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise plans
replacements.to: Plus、Pro、Business 和 Enterprise 计划已包含用量

replacements.from: Sign in from another device with a one-time code
replacements.to: 使用一次性代码从另一台设备登录
提供你自己的 API key

replacements.from: API key login is disabled by this workspace. Sign in with ChatGPT to continue.
replacements.to: 此工作区已禁用 API key 登录。请使用 ChatGPT 登录继续。

replacements.from: Codex will use usage-based billing with your API key.
replacements.to: Codex 将使用你的 API key 按量计费。

replacements.from: Use your own OpenAI API key for usage-based billing
replacements.to: 使用你自己的 OpenAI API key 按量计费

replacements.from: Paste or type your API key below. It will be stored locally in auth.json.
replacements.to: 在下方粘贴或输入 API key。它会保存在本地 auth.json 中。
检测到 OPENAI_API_KEY 环境变量。

replacements.from: Paste a different key if you prefer to use another account.
replacements.to: 如果想使用其他账号，请粘贴另一个 key。

replacements.from: Paste or type your API key
replacements.to: 粘贴或输入你的 API key
保存 API key 失败：{err}

replacements.from: Sign in to the app on ChatGPT in the browser window that just opened.
replacements.to: 请在刚打开的浏览器窗口中，在 ChatGPT 上登录该应用。

replacements.from: Complete authentication in the browser window that just opened.
replacements.to: 请在刚打开的浏览器窗口中完成身份验证。

replacements.from: Then return here and select \"I already signed in\".
replacements.to: 然后回到这里并选择“我已登录”。

replacements.from: Complete the requested action in the browser window that just opened.
replacements.to: 请在刚打开的浏览器窗口中完成请求的操作。

replacements.from: Then return here and select \"I finished\".
replacements.to: 然后回到这里并选择“我已完成”。

replacements.from: Complete app setup on ChatGPT in the browser window that just opened.
replacements.to: 请在刚打开的浏览器窗口中，在 ChatGPT 上完成应用设置。

replacements.from: Sign in there if needed, then return here and select \"I already Installed it\".
replacements.to: 如有需要请先在那里登录，然后回到这里并选择“我已安装”。

replacements.from: Note: You’re in a subdirectory of a Git project. Trusting will apply to the repository root: {}
replacements.to: 注意：你当前位于 Git 项目的子目录。信任操作将应用到仓库根目录：{}

replacements.from:
Do you trust the contents of this directory? Working with untrusted \
                 contents comes with higher risk of prompt injection. Trusting the \
                 directory allows project-local config, hooks, and exec policies to load.
replacements.to: 你信任此目录中的内容吗？处理不受信任的内容会带来更高的提示注入风险。信任此目录后，将允许加载项目本地配置、hooks 和执行策略。

replacements.from: Hooks can run outside the sandbox after you trust them.
replacements.to: 信任 hooks 后，它们可以在沙盒外运行。
不信任并继续（hooks 不会运行）

replacements.from: Prefix a command with ! to run it locally
replacements.to: 在命令前加 ! 可在本地运行

replacements.from: Only ask for actions detected as potentially unsafe.
replacements.to: 仅在检测到可能不安全的操作时询问。

replacements.from: Subagents will be enabled in the next session.
replacements.to: 子代理将在下个会话启用。

replacements.from: Memories will be enabled in the next session.
replacements.to: 记忆将在下个会话启用。
仅应用到 Plan 模式覆盖项

replacements.from: Apply to global default and Plan mode override
replacements.to: 应用到全局默认值和 Plan 模式覆盖项

replacements.from: Find and fix a bug in @filename
replacements.to: 查找并修复 @filename 中的 bug
使用 /skills 列出可用技能

replacements.from: Check recently modified functions for compatibility
replacements.to: 检查最近修改的函数是否兼容

replacements.from: How many files have been modified?

replacements.to: 这个算法的扩展性好吗？

replacements.from: Raw output mode on: transcript text is shown for clean terminal selection.
replacements.to: 原始输出模式已开启：会话文本将以便于终端选择的方式显示。

replacements.from: Raw output mode off: rich transcript rendering restored.
replacements.to: 原始输出模式已关闭：已恢复富文本会话渲染。

replacements.from: Failed to enable Approve for me
Failed to enable Approve for me: {err}
Failed to refresh overridden Approve for me settings
replacements.to: 刷新覆盖后的“替我批准”设置失败

replacements.from: Failed to refresh overridden Approve for me settings: {err}
replacements.to: 刷新覆盖后的“替我批准”设置失败：{err}

replacements.from: No transcript available for this session
Failed to read session metadata from {}
replacements.to: 无法从 {} 读取会话元数据

replacements.from: Failed to read session metadata from selected session
replacements.to: 无法从所选会话读取会话元数据

replacements.from: Search scanned first {} sessions; more may exist
replacements.to: 已搜索前 {} 个会话；可能还有更多

replacements.from: Model selection is disabled until startup completes.
replacements.to: 启动完成前无法选择模型。

replacements.from: Models are being updated; please try /model again in a moment.
replacements.to: 模型列表正在更新，请稍后再试 /model。

replacements.from: Warning: OpenAI base URL is overridden to {base_url}. Selecting models may not be supported or work properly.
replacements.to: 警告：OpenAI base URL 已覆盖为 {base_url}。模型选择可能不受支持或无法正常工作。

replacements.from: Choose a specific model and reasoning level (current: {current_label})
replacements.to: 选择具体模型和推理等级（当前：{current_label}）

replacements.from: Pick a quick auto mode or browse all models.
replacements.to: 选择快速自动模式，或浏览全部模型。

replacements.from: No additional models are available right now.
replacements.to: 当前没有其他可用模型。

replacements.from: Access legacy models by running codex -m <model_name> or in your config.toml
replacements.to: 如需使用旧模型，请运行 codex -m <model_name> 或在 config.toml 中配置
用户选择的 Plan 覆盖项（{}）
内置 Plan 默认值（不使用推理）

replacements.from: Set the global default reasoning level and the Plan mode override. This replaces the current {plan_reasoning_source}.
replacements.to: 设置全局默认推理等级和 Plan 模式覆盖项。这会替换当前的 {plan_reasoning_source}。
选择将 {reasoning_phrase} 应用到哪里。

replacements.from: ⚠ {effort_label} reasoning effort can quickly consume Plus plan rate limits.
replacements.to: ⚠ {effort_label} 推理等级可能很快消耗 Plus 计划速率额度。

replacements.from: To get started, describe a task or try one of these commands:
replacements.to: 要开始使用，请描述任务，或试试以下命令：

replacements.from: - create an AGENTS.md file with instructions for Codex
replacements.to: - 创建包含 Codex 指令的 AGENTS.md 文件

replacements.from: - choose what Codex is allowed to do
replacements.to: - 选择 Codex 被允许执行的操作

replacements.from: - choose what model and reasoning effort to use
replacements.to: - 选择使用的模型和推理等级

replacements.from: - review any changes and find issues
replacements.to: - 审查当前改动并发现问题

replacements.from: Current model name with reasoning level
replacements.to: 当前模型名称和推理等级
项目名称（不可用时省略）
当前 Git 分支（不可用时省略）

replacements.from: Open pull request number for the current branch (omitted when unavailable)
replacements.to: 当前分支的开放 PR 编号（不可用时省略）

replacements.from: Committed branch changes against the default branch (omitted when unavailable)
replacements.to: 相对默认分支的已提交变更（不可用时省略）

replacements.from: Compact session run-state text (Ready, Working, Thinking)
replacements.to: 紧凑会话运行状态文本（就绪、工作中、思考中）

replacements.from: Active permission profile or sandbox mode
replacements.to: 当前权限配置或沙盒模式

replacements.to: 上下文窗口剩余百分比（未知时省略）

replacements.from: Percentage of context window used (omitted when unknown)
replacements.to: 上下文窗口已用百分比（未知时省略）

replacements.from: Remaining usage on the primary usage limit (omitted when unavailable)
replacements.to: 主要用量限制的剩余额度（不可用时省略）

replacements.from: Remaining usage on the secondary usage limit (omitted when unavailable)
replacements.to: 次要用量限制的剩余额度（不可用时省略）

replacements.from: Total context window size in tokens (omitted when unknown)
replacements.to: 上下文窗口总 token 数（未知时省略）

replacements.to: 当前会话总 token 用量（为零时省略）

replacements.to: 当前会话输入 token 总量

replacements.from: Total output tokens used in session
replacements.to: 当前会话输出 token 总量

replacements.from: Current thread identifier (omitted until thread starts)
replacements.to: 当前线程标识符（线程开始前省略）

replacements.from: Whether Fast mode is currently active
replacements.to: Fast 模式当前是否启用

replacements.from: Whether raw scrollback mode is active
replacements.to: 原始回滚模式是否启用

replacements.from: Current thread title, or thread identifier when unnamed
replacements.to: 当前线程标题；未命名时显示线程标识符

replacements.from: Workspace notification headline (Enterprise workspaces only; omitted when unavailable)
replacements.to: 工作区通知标题（仅企业工作区；不可用时省略）

replacements.from: Latest task progress from update_plan (omitted until available)
replacements.to: update_plan 的最新任务进度（可用前省略）

replacements.from: Select which items to display in the status line.
replacements.to: 选择要在状态栏中显示的项目。

replacements.from: Project name (falls back to current directory name)
replacements.to: 项目名称（回退为当前目录名）

replacements.from: Spinner while working, action-required message while blocked.
replacements.to: 工作时显示旋转指示，阻塞时显示需要操作的消息。

replacements.from: Compact session run-state text (Ready, Working, Thinking)
replacements.to: 紧凑会话运行状态文本（就绪、工作中、思考中）

replacements.from: Current thread title, or thread identifier when unnamed
replacements.to: 当前线程标题；未命名时显示线程标识符
当前 Git 分支（不可用时省略）

replacements.from: Percentage of context window remaining (omitted when unknown)
replacements.to: 上下文窗口剩余百分比（未知时省略）

replacements.to: 上下文窗口已用百分比（未知时省略）

replacements.to: 主要用量限制的剩余额度（不可用时省略）

replacements.to: 次要用量限制的剩余额度（不可用时省略）

replacements.to: 当前会话总 token 用量（为零时省略）

replacements.to: 当前会话输入 token 总量

replacements.from: Total output tokens used in session
replacements.to: 会话已使用的输出 token 总量

replacements.from: Current thread identifier (omitted until thread starts)
replacements.to: 当前线程标识符（线程开始前省略）

replacements.from: Whether Fast mode is currently active
replacements.to: Fast 模式当前是否启用

replacements.from: Current model name with reasoning level
replacements.to: 当前模型名称和推理等级

replacements.from: Latest task progress from update_plan (omitted until available)
replacements.to: update_plan 的最新任务进度（可用前省略）

replacements.from: Select which items to display in the terminal title.
replacements.to: 选择要在终端标题中显示的项目。

replacements.from: Personality selection is disabled until startup completes.
replacements.to: 启动完成前无法选择个性。

replacements.from: Current model ({current_model}) doesn't support personalities. Try /model to pick a different model.
replacements.to: 当前模型（{current_model}）不支持个性。请尝试 /model 选择其他模型。

replacements.from: Choose a communication style for Codex.
replacements.to: 选择 Codex 的沟通风格。

replacements.from: The non-admin sandbox protects your files and prevents network access under most circumstances. However, it carries greater risk if prompt injected. To upgrade to the default sandbox, run
replacements.to: 非管理员沙盒通常会保护你的文件并阻止网络访问。不过，如果发生提示注入，风险会更高。若要升级到默认沙盒，请运行

replacements.from: No recent auto-review denials in this thread.
replacements.to: 本会话最近没有自动审查拒绝。

replacements.from: Denials are recorded after auto-review rejects an action.
replacements.to: 自动审查拒绝某个操作后会记录在这里。

replacements.from: That thread is no longer available.
Auto-review did not include a rationale.
Select a denied action to approve.
replacements.to: 选择要批准重试的已拒绝操作。

replacements.from: That auto-review denial is no longer available.
replacements.to: 该自动审查拒绝记录不再可用。

replacements.from: Approval recorded for one retry of the selected auto-review denial.
replacements.to: 已记录批准，将对选中的自动审查拒绝操作重试一次。

replacements.from: The model will see the approval context; the retry still goes through auto-review.
replacements.to: 模型会看到批准上下文；重试仍会经过自动审查。

replacements.from: When Codex runs with full access, it can edit any file on your computer and run commands with network, without your approval.
replacements.to: Codex 以完全访问运行时，可以编辑计算机上的任何文件，并在不经你批准的情况下运行联网命令。

replacements.from: Exercise caution when enabling full access. This significantly increases the risk of data loss, leaks, or unexpected behavior.
replacements.to: 启用完全访问请谨慎。这会显著增加数据丢失、泄露或意外行为的风险。

replacements.from: Apply full access for this session
replacements.to: 为本会话应用完全访问

replacements.from: Enable full access and remember this choice
replacements.to: 启用完全访问并记住此选择

replacements.from: Go back without enabling full access
Internal error: missing the 'read-only' approval preset.
replacements.to: 内部错误：缺少 “read-only” 批准预设。

replacements.from: Internal error: missing the 'auto' approval preset.
replacements.to: 内部错误：缺少 “auto” 批准预设。

replacements.from: Internal error: missing the 'full-access' approval preset.
replacements.to: 内部错误：缺少 “full-access” 批准预设。

replacements.from: Codex can read files in the current workspace. Approval is required to edit files or access the internet.
replacements.to: Codex 可以读取当前工作区中的文件。编辑文件或访问互联网需要批准。

replacements.from: Codex can read and edit files in the current workspace, and run commands. Approval is required to access the internet or edit other files. (Identical to Agent mode)
replacements.to: Codex 可以读取和编辑当前工作区中的文件，并运行命令。访问互联网或编辑其他文件需要批准。（等同于代理模式）

replacements.from: Codex can edit files outside this workspace and access the internet without asking for approval. Exercise caution when using.
replacements.to: Codex 可以编辑此工作区外的文件，并无需批准即可访问互联网。使用时请谨慎。

replacements.from: Enable the apps feature to use $ or /apps.
replacements.to: 启用应用功能后才能使用 $ 或 /apps。
正在加载已安装和可用应用...

replacements.from: This updates when the full list is ready.
replacements.to: 完整列表就绪后会自动更新。

replacements.from: Use $ to insert an installed app into your prompt.
replacements.to: 使用 $ 将已安装应用插入提示。
已安装 {installed}/{total} 个可用应用。

replacements.from: {status_label}. Press Enter to open the app page to install, manage, or enable/disable this app.
replacements.to: {status_label}。按 Enter 打开应用页面，以安装、管理、启用或禁用此应用。

replacements.from: {status_label}. Press Enter to open the app page to install this app.
replacements.to: {status_label}。按 Enter 打开应用页面以安装此应用。

replacements.from: Manage this app in your browser.
replacements.to: 在浏览器中管理此应用。

replacements.from: Install this app in your browser, then reload Codex.
replacements.to: 在浏览器中安装此应用，然后重新加载 Codex。

replacements.from: IDE context was skipped for this message.
replacements.to: 本条消息已跳过 IDE 上下文。

replacements.from: Future messages will include your current IDE selection and open tabs.
replacements.to: 后续消息会包含当前 IDE 选区和打开的标签页。

replacements.from: IDE context could not be enabled.
replacements.to: 无法启用 IDE 上下文。

replacements.from: Type a goal objective and press Enter
Mark it active and continue when idle
replacements.to: 标记为活跃，并在空闲时继续

replacements.from: Keep it paused; use /goal resume later
replacements.to: 保持暂停；稍后可用 /goal resume 恢复

replacements.from: device code login is not enabled for this Codex server. Use the browser login or verify the server URL.
replacements.to: 此 Codex 服务器未启用设备码登录。请使用浏览器登录或检查服务器 URL。

replacements.from: device code request failed with status {status}
replacements.to: 设备码请求失败，状态码 {status}

replacements.from: device auth timed out after 15 minutes
replacements.to: 设备授权已在 15 分钟后超时

replacements.from: A previous agent produced the plan below to accomplish the user's task.
replacements.to: 之前的代理为完成用户任务生成了下面的计划。

replacements.from: Implement the plan in a fresh context. Treat the plan as the source of
replacements.to: 在全新上下文中实施此计划。将计划视为

replacements.from: user intent, re-read files as needed, and carry the work through
replacements.to: 用户意图的来源，按需重新读取文件，并持续推进
没有可用的已批准计划
使用此计划开启新会话。

replacements.from: Switch to Default and start coding.
replacements.to: 切换到默认模式并开始编码。

replacements.from: Tip: press {list_shortcut} to open this list directly.
replacements.to: 提示：按 {list_shortcut} 可直接打开此列表。
已启用 {enabled_count} 个技能，已禁用 {disabled_count} 个技能

replacements.from: Heads up, you have less than {remaining_percent:.0}% of your {limit_label} limit left. Run /status for a breakdown.
replacements.to: 提醒：你的 {limit_label} 限制剩余不足 {remaining_percent:.0}%。运行 /status 查看详情。

replacements.from: Uses fewer credits for upcoming turns.
replacements.to: 后续轮次消耗更少额度。
保留当前模型（不再提醒）

replacements.from: Hide future rate limit reminders about switching models.
replacements.to: 以后不再显示切换模型的额度提醒。

replacements.from: Switch to {switch_model} for lower credit usage?
replacements.to: 切换到 {switch_model} 以降低额度消耗？

replacements.from: You've reached your workspace credit limit
replacements.to: 已达到工作区额度限制

replacements.from: Tip: Codex can only inspect keys your terminal sends.
replacements.to: 提示：Codex 只能检查终端实际发送的按键。

replacements.from: Still waiting? If nothing changes when you press a key, your terminal is not sending that key to Codex. Only received keys can be assigned as shortcuts.
replacements.to: 还在等待？如果按键后没有变化，说明终端没有把该按键发送给 Codex。只有收到的按键才能分配为快捷键。

replacements.from: Press any key to see what Codex receives. Esc is inspected; Ctrl+C closes.
replacements.to: 按任意键查看 Codex 收到的内容。Esc 会被检查；Ctrl+C 关闭。

replacements.from: Turn skills on or off. Your changes are saved automatically.

replacements.from: Use /compact when the conversation gets long to summarize history and free up context.
replacements.to: 对话变长时使用 /compact，总结历史并释放上下文。

replacements.from: Start a fresh idea with /new; the previous session stays in history.
replacements.to: 用 /new 开始新想法；上一会话会保留在历史中。

replacements.from: Use /feedback to send logs to the maintainers when something looks off.
replacements.to: 发现异常时使用 /feedback 向维护者发送日志。

replacements.from: Switch models or reasoning effort quickly with /model.
replacements.to: 使用 /model 快速切换模型或推理强度。

replacements.from: Use /permissions to control when Codex asks for confirmation.
replacements.to: 使用 /permissions 控制 Codex 何时需要确认。

replacements.from: Run /review to get a code review of your current changes.
replacements.to: 运行 /review，审查当前代码改动。

replacements.from: Use /skills to list available skills or ask Codex to use one.
replacements.to: 使用 /skills 列出可用技能，或要求 Codex 使用某个技能。

replacements.from: Use /status to see the current model, approvals, and token usage.
replacements.to: 使用 /status 查看当前模型、批准设置和 token 用量。

replacements.from: Use /statusline to configure which items appear in the status line.
replacements.to: 使用 /statusline 配置状态栏显示的项目。

replacements.from: Use /fork to branch the current chat into a new thread.
replacements.to: 使用 /fork 将当前聊天分支为新线程。

replacements.from: Use /side to start a side conversation in a temporary fork without polluting the main thread.
replacements.to: 使用 /side 在临时分支中开启旁路对话，不影响主线程。

replacements.from: Use /init to create an AGENTS.md with project-specific guidance.
replacements.to: 使用 /init 创建包含项目专属指引的 AGENTS.md。

replacements.from: Use /mcp to list configured MCP tools.
replacements.to: 使用 /mcp 列出已配置的 MCP 工具。

replacements.from: Run `codex app` to open Codex Desktop (it installs on macOS if needed).
replacements.to: 运行 `codex app` 打开 Codex Desktop（必要时会在 macOS 上安装）。

replacements.from: Use /personality to customize how Codex communicates.
replacements.to: 使用 /personality 自定义 Codex 的沟通方式。

replacements.from: Use /rename to rename your threads for easier thread resuming.
replacements.to: 使用 /rename 重命名线程，方便以后恢复。

replacements.from: Use the OpenAI docs MCP for API questions; enable it with `codex mcp add openaiDeveloperDocs --url https://developers.openai.com/mcp`.
replacements.to: API 问题可使用 OpenAI docs MCP；通过 `codex mcp add openaiDeveloperDocs --url https://developers.openai.com/mcp` 启用。

replacements.from: Join the OpenAI community Discord: http://discord.gg/openai
replacements.to: 加入 OpenAI 社区 Discord：http://discord.gg/openai

replacements.from: Visit the Codex community forum: https://community.openai.com/c/codex/37
You can run any shell command from Codex using `!` (e.g. `!ls`)
replacements.to: 可在 Codex 中使用 `!` 运行任意 shell 命令（例如 `!ls`）

replacements.from: Type / to open the command popup; Tab autocompletes slash commands.
replacements.to: 输入 / 打开命令弹窗；Tab 可补全斜杠命令。

replacements.from: When the composer is empty, press Esc to step back and edit your last message; Enter confirms.
replacements.to: 输入框为空时，按 Esc 返回并编辑上一条消息；Enter 确认。

replacements.from: Press Tab to queue a message when a task is running; otherwise it sends immediately (except `!`).
replacements.to: 任务运行时按 Tab 可排队发送消息；否则会立即发送（`!` 除外）。

replacements.from: [tui.keymap] in ~/.codex/config.toml lets you rebind supported shortcuts.
replacements.to: `~/.codex/config.toml` 中的 [tui.keymap] 可重新绑定支持的快捷键。

replacements.from: See the Codex keymap documentation for supported actions and examples.
replacements.to: 查看 Codex 键位文档了解支持的动作和示例。

replacements.from: Paste an image with Ctrl+V to attach it to your next message.
replacements.to: 按 Ctrl+V 粘贴图片，将其附加到下一条消息。

replacements.from: You can resume a previous conversation by running `codex resume`
replacements.to: 可运行 `codex resume` 恢复之前的对话。

replacements.from: Use /copy or press Ctrl+O to copy the latest agent response as Markdown.
replacements.to: 使用 /copy 或按 Ctrl+O 将最新代理回复复制为 Markdown。

replacements.from: Frontier model for complex coding, research, and real-world work.
replacements.to: 面向复杂编码、研究和真实工作的前沿模型。

replacements.from: Balances speed and reasoning depth for everyday tasks
replacements.to: 在日常任务中平衡速度和推理深度

replacements.from: Greater reasoning depth for complex problems
replacements.to: 为复杂问题提供更深推理

replacements.from: Extra high reasoning depth for complex problems
replacements.to: 为复杂问题提供极高推理深度

replacements.from:
GPT-5.5 is now available in Codex. It's our strongest agentic coding model yet, built to reason through large codebases, check assumptions with tools, and keep going until the work is done.

Learn more: https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-5/
replacements.to:
GPT-5.5 现已在 Codex 中可用。这是目前最强的代理式编码模型，适合理解大型代码库、用工具核查假设，并持续推进直到任务完成。

了解更多：https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-5/
适合日常编码的强模型。

replacements.from: Small, fast, and cost-efficient model for simpler coding tasks.
replacements.to: 小型、快速、成本高效，适合较简单的编码任务。

replacements.from: Optimized for professional work and long-running agents.
replacements.to: 针对专业工作和长时间运行的代理任务优化。

replacements.from: Balances speed with some reasoning; useful for straightforward queries and short explanations
replacements.to: 在速度和一定推理之间取得平衡，适合直接查询和简短解释

replacements.from: Provides a solid balance of reasoning depth and latency for general-purpose tasks
replacements.to: 为通用任务提供推理深度和延迟之间的稳健平衡

replacements.from: Maximizes reasoning depth for complex or ambiguous problems
replacements.to: 为复杂或模糊问题最大化推理深度

replacements.from: Extra high reasoning for complex problems
replacements.to: 为复杂问题提供极高推理

replacements.from: Automatic approval review model for Codex.
replacements.to: Codex 自动批准审查模型。
